system_info.name: Guidance Counseling Management System
system_info.mission: Supporting student mental wellness through accessible, confidential counseling services. Providing a safe, supportive, and confidential environment.

areas_of_support.Academic: Study habits, time management, test anxiety, academic motivation, and goal setting.
areas_of_support.Personal: Stress management, relationship concerns, self-esteem, emotional wellness, and personal growth.
areas_of_support.Career: Career path exploration, mock interviews, resume guidance, and professional development.
areas_of_support.Wellness: Mental health awareness, mindfulness, coping strategies, and holistic well-being.

dashboard_guide.Profile: Keep your contact info, year level, and program updated. This helps the counselor reach you if needed.
dashboard_guide.Book Appointment: 1. Choose a Topic. 2. Select Session Type (In-Person/Online). 3. Pick Date/Time. 4. Review & Submit. Instant confirmation provided.
dashboard_guide.Send Inquiry: For confidential messages that don't require a full session. Responses provided within 1–2 school days.
dashboard_guide.Documents: Request Good Moral Certificates or Admission Slips. Approval typically takes 1–3 business days. You'll specify School Year and Professor for admission slips.
dashboard_guide.History: Track your completed sessions, view progress notes, and see your improvement stats calculated by the counselor.

wellness_tips: Practice Mindfulness: Spend 5 minutes a day focusing on your breath to reduce stress.
Prioritize Sleep: Aim for 7–9 hours to maintain focus and emotional balance.
Stay Connected: Reach out to friends or family when feeling overwhelmed.
Physical Activity: Even a 10-minute walk can significantly boost your mood.
study_habits: Pomodoro Technique: Work for 25 minutes, then take a 5-minute break to maintain concentration.
Active Recall: Instead of re-reading, test yourself on the material to improve memory retention.
Organized Workspace: Keep your study area clean to reduce distractions and mental clutter.
Spaced Repetition: Review your notes at increasing intervals to move information to long-term memory.

policies.Confidentiality: 100% Confidential. Records are only accessible to authorized guidance personnel and required administrators.
policies.Document Approval: 1–3 Business Days from the time of submission.
policies.Emergency: For immediate danger, call 911 (Philippine National Emergency) or contact SLSU security/authorities.
policies.Data Retention: Data is stored securely and retained according to school policy and counseling standards.

faqs.question: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.answer: Go to the Student Dashboard, select 'Book Appointment', fill in the reason, choose Session Type, pick a date and time, and submit.

faqs.question: How long does document approval take?
faqs.answer: Document requests like Good Moral Certificates typically take 1–3 business days to be approved by the counselor.

faqs.question: Where is the guidance office located?
faqs.answer: The Guidance Office is located at the SLSU Lucban Campus.
